label: neither
rationale: 'Utajua hujui' is directed at an individual ('kasongo fucked us') as a personal grievance, not an ethnic group; the NCIC-flagged phrase targets a named individual in context.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Parasite' is aimed at Wetangula as an individual politician, not transferred onto the Mulembe community - personal abuse of a named person.

label: neither
rationale: Primarily an electoral/institutional complaint about nepotism and appointment of a Kalenjin VC over qualified Luhyas; criticism is of a policy decision and named politicians, not a collective contempt attribution to Kalenjins as a group.

label: neither
rationale: 'You disgrace my community' is a rebuke directed at an individual - the speaker is defending their own community rather than attacking another.

label: neither
rationale: Reporting/quoting a political confrontation between named individuals (Gachagua, Ruto); no group attack.

label: offensive
rationale: 'God fearing thief' and 'our thief' are sarcastic personal insults aimed at a named official, not at an ethnic community.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Malaya' (prostitute) is crude personal abuse aimed at the individual being addressed, with no ethnic group target.

label: hate
rationale: 'Kiluyus have never made anyone president in Kenya without rigging' attributes election fraud collectively and immutably to the Kikuyu community as a whole - NCIC collective contempt.

label: hate
rationale: 'Kikuyu tyranny' and 'don't try to sneak in behind Sifuna or Kalonzo' transfers the sins of named politicians onto the entire Kikuyu community, declaring them unfit to hold power and demanding their exclusion.

label: neither
rationale: Personal grievance against a named individual (Morara Kebaso) as an opportunist; 'kasongo boy' is a personal insult with no ethnic group target.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Stupid and dumb' is a generic insult aimed at unnamed voters in a constituency (Ol Kalou), not grounded in a protected characteristic.

label: offensive
rationale: 'IQ yako ipo matopeni' and 'jomba' are personal insults aimed at the individual being addressed, no ethnic group target.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Mjinga by default' is a personal insult directed at the individual being addressed, no protected characteristic.

label: neither
rationale: Internal opposition coalition politics, criticising a named group ('linda mwananchi') and their political strategy; 'juveniles' is political contempt for a faction, not an ethnic group.

label: hate
rationale: 'Pride and Hate of Raila is what has made you drown' collectively attributes a fatal character flaw (pride, hatred) to Kikuyus as a group and commands them to 'Learn or perish' - NCIC collective contempt with a veiled threat.

label: hate
rationale: 'Islamic party responsible for thousands of Hindus killing and rape' collectively attributes mass violence and atrocity to a religious-political community - group-level incitement.

label: neither
rationale: Geographic reference to Ol Kalou with no attack on any group.

label: hate
rationale: 'Show us the true colors of kikuyus' transfers Uhuru's perceived betrayal onto the entire Kikuyu community - collective contempt under the NCIC standard.

label: hate
rationale: 'Nobody wants anything to do with Kikuyu president or Kikuyu project' declares the entire Kikuyu community unfit for political leadership - NCIC collective exclusion.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Giant dick' is vulgar personal abuse aimed at Matiangi as an individual politician, no ethnic group target.

label: neither
rationale: A personal plea to the president; no attack of any kind.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Tribal bigot' is a personal characterisation of Gachagua as an individual; the insult is not transferred onto his ethnic community.

label: hate
rationale: 'Luos are FOOLS' is a blanket collective derogatory attribution to the entire Luo community - NCIC ethnic contempt even without a violence call.

label: offensive
rationale: Crude sexual insult directed at an individual (Rep. Ogles), no protected characteristic.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Chawa', 'wahaini', 'pumbafff' are directed at diaspora activists as a political faction, not an ethnic or national-origin group under the NCIC standard.
